name: git-workflow
description: Local Git workflow plugin for cleaning stale branches, committing changes, and creating pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Clean branches, commit changes, and open pull requests.
interface.longDescription: Bundle local Git workflow skills for common repository maintenance: pruning gone branches and worktrees, creating conventional commits, and completing commit-push-pull-request flows with consistent safety checks.
defaultPrompt: Clean gone Git branches and related worktrees.
Commit current changes with a conventional message.
Commit, push, and create a pull request.
